title: Green Thumb Industries Inc Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Green Thumb Industries Inc's analyst rating consensus is a Strong Buy, based on the ratings of 5 Wall Streets Analysts. More specifically, nine analyst recommendations are Strong Buy and one is Buy. Analyst price targets vary depending on the source. The average 12-month price target is $15.26, with a high forecast of $20.00 and a low forecast of $13.16. Based on short-term price targets offered by eight analysts, the average price target comes to $17.84, with forecasts ranging from a low of $13.49 to a high of $21.46. Green Thumb Industries Inc has 125.06% upside potential, based on the analysts' average price target. Overall, the analyst consensus is quite bullish on Green Thumb Industries stock heading into and through 2024. More recent data suggests average price targets representing increases of 137.55% from closing prices around $7.51.
